claim_shape: (Currently Amended) A method for client-side processing and validation of document imagery, the method comprising:obtaining, by a computing device associated with an end-user, video data comprising a plurality of frames from a camera of the computing device; at a predetermined interval, selecting, by the computing device, a frame from a plurality of frames of the video data obtained during a predetermined interval for processing at an imaging software program locally executed on the computing device in response to a completion of the predetermined interval; [[and]] obtaining, by the computing device[[,]] from the imaging software program, a set of boundaries corresponding to one or more edges of a document in the selected frame according to pixel intensity of a set of pixels containing the document in the selected frame that was selected in response to the completion of the predetermined interval;identifying, by the computing device, one or more dimensions of the document based upon the set of boundaries of the document, the one or more dimensions including an aspect ratio of the document; and in response to determining that the one or more dimensions of the document satisfies a preconfigured aspect ratio threshold, validating, by the computing device, the one or more dimensions of the document as a document type. Currently amended 2
remedy: Examiner's ground: Claims 1-3, 5-7, 11-13, and 15-17 are rejected under 35 U.S.C. 102(a)(1) as being anticipated by Eid et al. (USPAPN 2016/0253569).
